# Creating an EBVCube NetCDF using the R package {#sec-creating}

*Learning objectives: run the four-step creation pipeline end-to-end and produce a valid netCDF.*

## Step 2 — `ebv_create()`

<!-- TODO: adapt advanced-usage.qmd, full runnable code block -->

## Step 3 — `ebv_add_data()`

<!-- TODO: adapt advanced-usage.qmd -->

## Step 4 — `ebv_attribute()`

<!-- TODO: adapt advanced-usage.qmd -->

## Taxonomic / species-level datasets

<!-- TODO: adapt advanced-usage.qmd "Taxonomic datasets" — relevant since dataset 30 is community composition -->

## Sanity-checking the result

<!-- TODO: ebv_properties(), ebv_datacubepaths(); optional Panoply callout -->

**Checkpoint:** you have produced your own `.nc` file and can list its datacube paths.
